project_type: Go CLI application (multi-personality binary for K3OS Linux distribution)
build_system: go build with CGO_ENABLED=0, GoReleaser v2 for releases, CircleCI for CI
test_framework: go test with testify/assert, testify/require, testify/mock
build_command: GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags "-s -w -extldflags -static" -tags static_build -o k3os .
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'go test ./...' to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o k3os .' to verify build succeeds. 3. Run 'go vet ./...' for basic correctness.
environment_constraints: Linux-only build target. CGO_ENABLED=0 required. golang.org/x/sys/unix already available as dependency.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits format. golangci-lint v2 must pass. Tests with -race flag. gofumpt + goimports formatting.
key_patterns: Internal packages under internal/. Build tags for Linux-only code (//go:build linux). Interfaces for testability. testify mocks for OS operations. Table-driven tests preferred.
directory_structure: main.go (entry point) -> internal/ (all packages): cc/ (cloud-config appliers), cli/ (CLI commands), config/ (configuration), enterchroot/ (chroot/boot), modalias/ (kernel module alias resolution), mount/ (mount operations), system/ (path constants)
